channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Broken glass, 16th June
item.description:
Broken glass outside route to Stockwell primary school and Lansdowne special educational needs and disabilities school

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Combermere Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Caught fly tipping, 16th June
item.description:
People in 101 Oakley drive have been dumping rubbish round the corner where the garages are as seen in photos. There is always rubbish on this corner but this time as seen in photos have been caught on camera fly tipping a huge bed frame on the corner. These are new residents and would like something done about this towards them as it makes the area look disgusting with rubbish dumped and it’s illegal.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 109, Oakley Drive, New Eltham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Depression, cracks, poor road surface., 16th June
item.description:
The road surface is severely deteriorated, with significant depressions, cracks, and uneven sections. As a result, whenever buses travel along this road, my house shakes violently. This persistent vibration is causing serious damage to my property, including cracks throughout the building and water ingress. The situation continues to worsen and is having a significant impact on both my family's wellbeing and my own physical and mental health. This issue has been reported on several occasions previously. While repair works have been carried out in the past, they appear to have been temporary patch repairs that fail shortly after completion. The underlying problem remains unresolved. I believe the road requires a full and permanent repair rather than further temporary maintenance. In addition, I request that the damage being caused to my property is investigated and appropriate action taken to address it. I am also concerned that this road may not be suitable for regular bus traffic, particularly given the size of the vehicles and the speed at which some of them travel. Consideration should be given to rerouting buses onto more appropriate main roads where possible. I would appreciate a thorough investigation into this matter and a response outlining the actions that will be taken to permanently resolve the issue. I look forward to hearing from you. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 300, Burnt Oak Lane, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 78 Miles Drive London SE28 0JA England, 16th June
item.description:
Waste bags dumped on the pavement blocking the entrance to the park. IT HAS BEEN MONTHS OF THIS please fix it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Murray Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sunken pavers. Walkway floods, 16th June
item.description:
Paving slabs are uneven and sunken. In rain pavement in passable due to depth of puddle

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barnhill Avenue, Hayes, Greater London

item.title: Combermere rd covered in litter, 16th June
item.description:
Reported multiple times over months, but litter remains all overcome Combermere rd. High traffic litter area that needs more regular litter picking. Street has 2 school where children and parents discard litter in street. Also used my taxi drivers and food delivery drivers who empty their cars and bikes of rubbish in street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Stockwell Green, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: England flag gone up on lamppost without permission, 16th June
item.description:
Flag on lamppost gone up tonight on Hudson Road at junction with Bristow Road. There are others along the road too. No permission granted.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hudson Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stoop and front garden used for drug taking and toilet, 16th June
item.description:
An unwanted visitor for several weeks doing drugs regularly on stoop and this morning urine on stoop by front door. Has been asked to leave but comes back.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Goulton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
